name: The White House
subject: The President’s agenda is defying critics
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=47472724a825a5f59c593fc0dcac1734c272f4b8061d272051675b537646169035b254359a1c589bcba848d38c402c76bfbfade649e67647

The President’s agenda is defying critics

Last week, calculations of America’s economic growth rate for the fourth quarter of 2017 were revised upward to show growth of nearly 3 percent. “That revision didn’t get nearly as much attention as when the initial read of that quarter’s growth came in below expectations at 2.6 percent,” Office of Management and Budget Director Mick Mulvaney said.

Director Mulvaney delivered his verdict: Too many on the left and in the media will pounce on any news they can to throw doubt on the effectiveness of President Donald J. Trump’s economic agenda.

But the economy is booming, as nearly any statistic you could pick makes clear:

- The U.S. unemployment rate in February marked a 17-year low.
- The number of Americans rating the economy good to excellent has hit an 18-year high.
- Average job growth numbers in 2018 are the strongest since 1997.
- Since January 2017, more than 2.5 million jobs have been added to the economy.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=47472724a825a5f572970fd33fff68509d9e3af4f4e81998c85b48de69e4405eb94e7bf61a7b8e040fa2acf1626a1801d2bfdcfb34f803ff
Read more about how President Trump’s leadership on the economy is making a difference for all Americans.

National public health advisory

Speaking at a National drug abuse summit in Atlanta yesterday, U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Jerome Adams announced his office’s first National public health advisory in 13 years. The Surgeon General urged more Americans to carry naloxone, a potentially lifesaving medication that can reverse the effects of an opioid overdose.

"You don't have to be a policeman or a firefighter or a paramedic to save a life," Dr. Adams said.

Earlier this week, the Surgeon General praised President Trump’s leadership in the fight against opioid abuse. The President’s opioid initiative “marks a significant moment in our national effort to reverse the deadly trends we have seen,” Dr. Adams wrote.

More:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=47472724a825a5f584de824d99d5aadef1fe355e5115dd0195c1d6930db2c2ea423409fd99492efe69fee69c312b9e00a6a355d45d9b96f6
Leadership is here to fight the opioid crisis

What to know about the President’s National Guard order

To give our Border Patrol agents the support they deserve, President Trump has authorized the deployment of National Guard units to America’s southern border.

Our Border Patrol agents work incredibly hard to do their jobs. These law enforcement personnel are tasked with securing thousands of miles of border, and they often do not have the manpower or resources necessary to address the flow of illegal immigration into the United States.

President Trump is taking this action because Congressional Democrats have obstructed efforts to secure our border. While the President will use every ounce of his existing powers to protect American national security, Congress must deliver a lasting fix to this problem.

More:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=47472724a825a5f53268f2be83c0edee73a206ed756b7ba0b30898f35abc6b3338ee3371b5daca71d0777b198bf1fcd8c691ca64ab79ba26
What you need to know about President Trump’s order to deploy our National Guard

body:
Fellow American, President Trump came up with a bold plan to protect Americans by building The Wall, and I need to know if you support it:
**Should We Build The Wall?**
---
| [**BUILD IT**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MDk2LWFjYWE5YzI0ZWFiNTQ1MzE4YTY1ZjQ3OTU2OGJjYTg0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3AYm9keV9pbWdfYnV0dG9uX2dldCtvbmUrbm93%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Quc3RldmVzY2FsaXNlLmNvbS9zdXJ2ZXktd2FsbC8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MDQwNl9TdGV2ZVNjYWxpc2VfQUUtR09QMw&K=Ev9p5Mf8l7fdSmbwbrJeRQ)
---
[**FORGET IT**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MDk2LWFjYWE5YzI0ZWFiNTQ1MzE4YTY1ZjQ3OTU2OGJjYTg0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3AYm9keV9pbWdfYnV0dG9uX2dldCtvbmUrbm93%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Quc3RldmVzY2FsaXNlLmNvbS9zdXJ2ZXktd2FsbC8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MDQwNl9TdGV2ZVNjYWxpc2VfQUUtR09QMw&K=vLCEbWGLngR9guSQq2jZbA)

Radical Democrats like Nancy Pelosi have held funding for The Wall as a political hostage... because weak and dysfunctional borders suit their agenda just fine. But they don't have to deal with the consequences in our communities. **You do.**

That's why I need to know if you stand with the President and me on building The Wall.

**The Wall is a common-sense and critical component of our nation 's security. **It will deter criminals, violence, human trafficking and national security threats from crossing undetected into our country. Where do you stand?

[ANSWER THE SURVEY](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MDk2LWFjYWE5YzI0ZWFiNTQ1MzE4YTY1ZjQ3OTU2OGJjYTg0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3AYm9keV9pbWdfYnV0dG9uX2RvbmF0ZStub3c%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Quc3RldmVzY2FsaXNlLmNvbS9zdXJ2ZXktd2FsbC8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MDQwNl9TdGV2ZVNjYWxpc2VfQUUtR09QMw&K=WmHVERw1iRZlPawvHfaRHw)
---

Once we build it - it'll be there to stay! **Pelosi won 't be able to treat it like a political bargaining chip** like the rest of our border security programs.

I have received THOUSANDS of messages from Conservatives who are concerned about this breakdown of law and order and the tragic stories it has caused \- **I am on your side and I am listening!**

It will take just two minutes of your time to send me your message. Please help me show the President that the American people are on his side.

Thank you for your guidance,

Steve Scalise

name: Our Revolution
subject: Birdie Sanders
body:
Birdie Sanders represents the everlasting endurance of our movement
#
Friends,
We will never forget the moment on the 2016 campaign trail when a little birdie landed on Senator Sanders's podium in Oregon.
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac00/bed43eb/58b03b41/75fe7217/4170759754/VEsH/ "https://shop.ourrevolution.com/?refcode=em180406-full")
That moment--serendipitous, loving, and joyfully passionate--is what Our Revolution is channeling into a sustained movement for progressive change.
After 18 months of organizing, we wanted to update our look to reflect the energy and passion that we felt when Our Revolution first launched.
Our goal was to create a look that represents the voice and identity of our local groups, volunteers, and members--in other words--all of you. Our new look is intended to represent all that we are fighting for and symbolizes the feedback we received on what Our Revolution means to you.
As we wondered how we could capture the energy of our movement, we kept coming back to that little bird. Birdie Sanders represents the everlasting endurance of our movement, the flight of our passion, and a little bit of magic.
[**Now, you can represent Our Revolution by rocking the bird that inspired millions of us.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac00/bed43eb/58b03b41/75fe7217/4170759754/VEsE/ "https://shop.ourrevolution.com/?refcode=em180406-full")
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac00/bed43eb/58b03b41/75fe7217/4170759754/VEsF/ "https://shop.ourrevolution.com/?refcode=em180406-full")
While our look has changed, our identity of grassroots activism, progressive values, local empowerment, and revitalizing our democracy remains the same. Our local groups, members, and supporters are fierce advocates for social change, rebels against the status quo, with a mandate to organize _everywhere_.
[**You can represent the political revolution too, by sporting our new look. Find your favorite gear in the Our Revolution online store!**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac00/bed43eb/58b03b41/75fe7217/4170759754/VEsC/ "https://shop.ourrevolution.com/?refcode=em180406-full")
We're so excited to continue this journey together to fully realize the future we all believe in.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

name: Ben Jealous
subject: The conviction of this campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friend -
**This is not where I expected to be in life.**
[](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a792/7ab0e2c4/7f525021/349a6ec9/1670155012/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQwNjhDIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st4-18?refcode=OHQ04068C")
I never expected to be knocking on doors on a Saturday afternoon, just months before my name will be on the ballot to be the next governor of Maryland.
But in these times, when Donald Trump is President, and he and his party are thoroughly and aggressively trying to divide us,**we all have to do what we can to pull our country back together. [If you believe in the power of this campaign to do that, can you chip in $5 today?](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a792/7ab0e2c4/7f525021/349a6ec9/1670155012/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQwNjhDIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st4-18?refcode=OHQ04068C")**
The core conviction of our campaign is _that we all matter_.
Every child, regardless of race, zip code, or their parents financial standing, should have a great education. No individual should be bankrupted for experiencing a health crisis. And our small businesses should the drivers of our economy. But currently, that's not happening in our country, and it's not happening in Maryland.
Last weekend I went canvassing with a team of first-time canvassers. This group of individuals was encouraged by the message of this campaign.
Along the way, I met a young woman who recently graduated with $60,000 of student loan debt. And because she couldn't find a job, her debt compounded because she couldn't keep up with the payments.
Susie, my running mate, and her husband, Bruce, met with Judith and Pamela, a Democrat and her Republican friend. By the end of their discussion with Susie, they both signed to volunteer for our campaign. Showing that this campaign isn't about partisan politics, but about making Maryland a better place for all.
People are searching for new leadership to strengthen the great state that they love. **And these stories are why I am running to be your next governor.**
I said I would never run for office unless two things could happen: We could win and we could make social movements stronger in the process.
**[Today, we're succeeding in both. If you want to help us continue this work, chip in $5 today. Together, we can make Maryland do big things again.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a792/7ab0e2c4/7f525021/349a6ec9/1670155012/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQwNjhDIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st4-18?refcode=OHQ04068C")**
Onward,
Ben

**[DONATE](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a792/7ab0e2c4/7f525021/349a6ec9/1670155012/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQwNjhDIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st4-18?refcode=OHQ04068C")**

name: Donna Edwards
subject: Standing Up For Women
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff04/767134fb/5ca7454e/43382485/3167748224/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hi Friend, I have some exciting news to share: I have just been endorsed by Feminist Majority in my race for Prince George's County Executive! It is an honor to be endorsed by an organization with such a profound history in advocating for women across the country. My deep commitment to improving the lives of women and girls is just one reason I have the support of Feminist Majority. I am a co-founder of the National Network to End Domestic Violence, where I advocated alongside Feminist Majority for the passing of the Domestic Violence Offender Gun Ban. And during my time in Congress, I worked tirelessly to advocate for women's rights, from defending reproductive rights to passing the Affordable Care Act. I want to continue standing up for women as the next Prince George's County Executive, and I can't do it without your help. **[Will you support my campaign by contributing $10 or more today?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff04/767134fb/5ca7454e/43382482/3167748224/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** If elected as County Executive, I will focus on early childhood education initiatives and improving access to quality, affordable childcare--two policy issues that will positively affect the lives of working mothers in Prince George's County. Building a community that supports women takes work, and it's work that we must do together. **[I hope you will show your support by making a donation of $10 or more to my campaign for County Executive.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff04/767134fb/5ca7454e/43382482/3167748224/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** Thank you so much for your support and for all the work you do. Together, we can build a community that puts women and girls first. Donna

**_A Note From Jeanie_**
**Dear Derek,**

**“Hiring is soaring and wages are rising at American small businesses,” according to the latest employment report from the National Federal of Independent Business.**
****
**Here in New Hampshire, we are blessed to have a Governor who is making the economy a number one priority. clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, APRIL 6TH | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, “Hiring is soaring and wages are rising at American small businesses,” according to the latest employment report from the National Federal of Independent Business. ** Here in New Hampshire, we are blessed to have a Governor who is making the economy a number one priority. Governor Sununu is out there every single day working to make New Hampshire more business-friendly, from reducing and eliminating burdensome regulations, attracting new businesses to the state, to helping retain and grow businesses that are already here. Also this week, the Governor and AG Gordon MacDonald announced that New Hampshire submitted an amicus brief to the US Supreme Court in the case of South Dakota v. Wayfair. Inc. In the brief, The Governor is very clear that New Hampshire businesses should not be forced to be a tax collector for other states. With Republicans leading, we are seeing an improved economy, a positive outlook, and a real sense that New Hampshire is heading in the right direction. It is so very important that we not be complacent, that we not “rest on our laurels” because there is much more work to do. The 2018 election is critical to New Hampshire’s continued economic success. With that in mind, If you’re thinking of running for office or want to learn more to help you make a decision to run, be sure to stop in at 10 Water Street on Wednesday, April 11 from 6 – 7:30 p.m. Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHT UPCOMING EVENTS PHOTO OF THE WEEK Governor Chris Sununu speaking with the YMCA's Youth and Government group at the State House! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT This week our Republican spotlight is Liz, Nancy, Mary, and Donna! They came to the office to help prepare mailings for an upcoming event. Thank you, ladies! \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc14/73a2bc12/3f004a3a/1fcd0fee/1410256361/VEsH/ "http://wolfforpa.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180406_surv1_engg_gq_ful__wfp&source=em18_180406_surv1_engg_gq_ful__wfp") Hello,

Every eligible Pennsylvanian deserves the right to make their voice heard.

But for too long, Republicans here and across the country have tried to make it harder to vote, depriving them of their voices.

Governor Wolf is taking action with a new set of reforms to make voting easier and more accessible while limiting the influence of special interests -- and he wants to hear your thoughts.

[**Let us know how we can make our elections more fair and secure. | **_The Road to Evansville_** There's more than one road to Evansville. While the expansion of I-69 is helping make the trip faster and easier than ever before, we have thousands of Hoosier Republicans who are finding their way to Evansville -- the location of our [2018 Indiana Republican State Convention](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d6a1c77631&e=1acd9bb3d6) \-- through their own local communities.

Whether it's through involvement in your local government or your local party, Hoosiers across Indiana are making their mark in our party through work close to home. Maybe you serve on a local board. Or maybe you make calls to voters during election season. Either way, you are the foundation of our party, and the reason why we've been so successful statewide.

Your work is marking your road to Evansville. And since you're already on your own route, there's one thing you can do right now that will help make sure your voice is heard loud and clear on the convention floor. And that's submitting testimony to be considered for inclusion in our 2018 Indiana Republican Party Platform.

The platform is a document that states what we stand for as a party. And it comes from each of you. We've got two more platform committee hearings -- one in South Bend on April 12, and the other on April 16 in Jeffersonville ([full details here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=11b85945ce&e=1acd9bb3d6)).

If you're close, stop by and share your thoughts on the issues impacting Hoosiers like you today. But if you can't make it, that's fine. You can also submit your written testimony to us via email at [platform@indiana.gop](mailto:platform@indiana.gop).

Your way to our 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention is through your own community. I see it as I travel the state, and I'll see it again on the convention floor in Evansville this June.

-Kyle Hupfer

_Picture: Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer stops for a photo with a large group of students who were attending the Steuben County Lincoln Day Dinner earlier this week. _

| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
| _**Expanding****Opportunity**** for All Hoosiers**_
Governor Holcomb had one of those days this week that he says have him, "bursting with pride to be Indiana's governor."

Yesterday, he joined hip hop recording artist MC Hammer to celebrate the launch of a new state program that will give a second chance at success to female offenders at the Indiana Women's Prison. This program will not only work to lower Indiana's recidivism rate (and save taxpayer money!); it will also be one more step to provide an expanded, skilled workforce for Indiana's growing economy.

A year-long program, the Last Mile provides offenders near the end of their time in prison with relevant job skills to propel them into tech careers when they are released from prison. Along with learning programming languages, they will learn important skills for success in the workplace.

100 percent of graduates of The Last Mile secure employment upon release—with a 0 percent recidivism rate. Indiana is just the second state in the nation to adopt this proven model. Take a moment to [learn more about the Last Mile](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cc686d9aac&e=1acd9bb3d6).

While the expansion of I-69 is helping make the trip faster and easier than ever before, we have... | | | | | | | The Road to Evansville There's more than one road to Evansville. While the expansion of I-69 is helping make the trip faster and easier than ever before, we have thousands of Hoosier Republicans who are finding their way to Evansville -- the location of our \-- through their own local communities. Whether it's through involvement in your local government or your local party, Hoosiers across Indiana are making their mark in our party through work close to home. Maybe you serve on a local board. Or maybe you make calls to voters during election season. Either way, you are the foundation of our party, and the reason why we've been so successful statewide. Your work is marking your road to Evansville. And since you're already on your own route, there's one thing you can do right now that will help make sure your voice is heard loud and clear on the convention floor. And that's submitting testimony to be considered for inclusion in our 2018 Indiana Republican Party Platform. The platform is a document that states what we stand for as a party. And it comes from each of you. We've got two more platform committee hearings -- one in South Bend on April 12, and the other on April 16 in Jeffersonville (). If you're close, stop by and share your thoughts on the issues impacting Hoosiers like you today. But if you can't make it, that's fine. You can also submit your written testimony to us via email at mailto:platform@indiana.gop. Your way to our 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention is through your own community. I see it as I travel the state, and I'll see it again on the convention floor in Evansville this June. -Kyle Hupfer Picture: Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer stops for a photo with a large group of students who were attending the Steuben County Lincoln Day Dinner earlier this week. | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | ExpandingOpportunity for All Hoosiers Governor Holcomb had one of those days this week that he says have him, "bursting with pride to be Indiana's governor." Yesterday, he joined hip hop recording artist MC Hammer to celebrate the launch of a new state program that will give a second chance at success to female offenders at the Indiana Women's Prison. This program will not only work to lower Indiana's recidivism rate (and save taxpayer money!); it will also be one more step to provide an expanded, skilled workforce for Indiana's growing economy. A year-long program, the Last Mile provides offenders near the end of their time in prison with relevant job skills to propel them into tech careers when they are released from prison. Along with learning programming languages, they will learn important skills for success in the workplace. 100 percent of graduates of The Last Mile secure employment upon release—with a 0 percent recidivism rate. Team Kaine supports the free press and its pursuit of the truth. Period.
|

[Sign your name to defend our free and independent press against partisan accusations of "Fake News" ->](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1355/3e0906/62be1962/3e34a53e/3335865830/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stand-with-free-and-independent-press?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Sign+your+name+to+defend+our+free+and+in&utm_campaign=20180406_1_PET_TEAM_Free-Press&source=20180406_1_PET_TEAM_Free-Press") | [**SIGN YOUR NAME ->**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1355/3e0906/62be1962/3e34a53d/3335865830/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stand-with-free-and-independent-press?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+YOUR+NAMEnbsprarr&utm_campaign=20180406_1_PET_TEAM_Free-Press&source=20180406_1_PET_TEAM_Free-Press")

Derek, a free press and local news committed to covering the issues that matter to our communities are a critical part of our democracy, both here in Virginia and across the country.

Tim knows that local news is often the strongest thread connecting people to their communities, and as Richmond's mayor, he saw the importance of local reporters firsthand. He also knows the job of a free press is to ensure our citizens are well-informed and to hold our leaders accountable.

That's exactly why President Trump's criticism of our country's news stations and news organizations is deeply concerning. The president is trying to discredit the very people tasked with giving us straight, unbiased information. **Team Kaine will always support the free press and its pursuit of the truth.[Sign your name to join us in defending a free press ->](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1355/3e0906/62be1962/3e34a53c/3335865830/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stand-with-free-and-independent-press?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Sign+your+name+to+join+us+in+defending+a&utm_campaign=20180406_1_PET_TEAM_Free-Press&source=20180406_1_PET_TEAM_Free-Press")**

Trump weaponized the term "fake news" to discredit any and all scrutiny that comes his way - regardless of whether that reporting is true or not. These attacks could have dangerous consequences: Just last week, a major company that owns local news stations across the country forced anchors at its stations to all read the exact same (awfully Trump-like) statement condemning "fake news." It went viral, and in response, many of its local news stations are standing up to say: We will not push an agenda, we will follow any story, and we will report the news.

As we approach the incredibly important 2018 midterm elections, we must do everything we can to defend local reporters and news stations in their efforts to tell true stories, to hold leaders accountable, and to serve the best interests of their communities.

[If you agree, add your name to our petition to stand with the free press as they continue to fend off attacks from those who would rather dodge accountability ->](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1355/3e0906/62be1962/3e34a533/3335865830/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stand-with-free-and-independent-press?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+If+you+agree+add+your+name+to+our+petiti&utm_campaign=20180406_1_PET_TEAM_Free-Press&source=20180406_1_PET_TEAM_Free-Press")

[https://secure.timkaine.com/free-press](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1355/3e0906/62be1962/3e34a532/3335865830/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stand-with-free-and-independent-press?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+httpssecuretimkainecomfreepress&utm_campaign=20180406_1_PET_TEAM_Free-Press&source=20180406_1_PET_TEAM_Free-Press")

Thanks for signing on,

_Team Kaine_
